strategic_objective: Determine if zero entropy in Destination Port for DDoS class indicates a narrow attack vector or dataset artifact and understand implications for model bias and overfitting.
key_checks: Measure class-conditioned distribution concentration of Destination Port
Analyze port usage diversity within DDoS and non-DDoS classes
Evaluate impact of port skew on class imbalance and predictive leverage
Check for dataset collection or labeling biases affecting port distribution
success_criteria: Clear differentiation between attack targeting and dataset artifact explanations
Quantification of potential bias or overfitting risks from port skew
Insights into how port distribution affects class representation
router_constraints: preserve feature scope for Destination Port
preserve evidence references e2 and e33
